creator: jcwells@u.washington.edu
text:
On Thu, 1 Jul 1999, Matthew Hunt wrote:

>On Wed, Jun 30, 1999 at 08:30:01PM -0700, Jason C. Wells wrote:
>
>>  Please change pkg/COMMENT for this pr to:
>>  "A popular virtual window manager for XWindows"
>
>X, X11, or the X Window System, please.

(nothing personal Matt)

An open note to everyone in the universe.

Do whatever you have to do to commit this port. I grow weary of
discussions about every fucking detail of COMMENT. I know your not really
asking permission to change thinngs so why be a bother. If you know it
needs to be changed then change it.

Thank You, 	| "Those who would trade freedom for security deserve neither
Jason Wells	| freedom nor security." - Benjamin Franklin
